primary_metrics.interpretation: Completeness of the final decision record against the frozen 34-field denominator.
Strict claim-level traceability; the baseline records sources but no standardized confidence.
Recall of the intentionally seeded Ghost-Logger conflict; precision is reported separately.
Escalation at an eligible Prepare-at-18h safeguard opportunity.
Presence of the minimum event fields needed to reconstruct the decision sequence.
Agreement with controlled state oracles; not external legal or operational truth.
Generation of the defined EvidencePack outputs.

source_review_operation_proxy.definition: The orchestrated count is unique source ingestion; the baseline count is the sum of all sources visible at each repeated worksheet review. This is not human time or cognitive workload.

limitations: This is a deterministic structured-workflow proxy, not a human analyst study.
It does not estimate analyst cognition, elapsed labour time, or legal accuracy.
Shared parsing isolates orchestration effects but understates real manual extraction effort.
State correctness measures agreement with controlled scenario oracles, not external truth.
The comparison cannot establish industrial effectiveness without practitioner evaluation.
